Guess who is going to do well out of an oil price shock! But not all Oil Majors are benefiting in the same way. BP and EXXON are far more exposed to the Middle East than is Chevron. This and more in the Chartbook Top Links today.
Find out more here: adamtooze.substack.com/p/oil…

Nice graphic illustrating the Biden-era shift in the US alliance system in Asia from hub and spokes to latticework. One thought was that it might be “Trump-proof”. This and more on the Chartbook Top Links today.
Find out more here: adamtooze.substack.com/p/oil…

Coal is still huge in China, but its role in the power system is shifting to that of a flexibility reserve. More on this in the Chartbook Top Link today.

the supplemental poverty rate is ~12% and there are ~350 million people here, do the math

"lead the charge" on confronting climate change, even rhetorically, let alone in terms of actual energy policy?
